description: The Lamborghini Reventón, produced in 2007-2009, was a limited-edition supercar based on the Murciélago LP640 with fighter-jet-inspired bodywork designed by Manfred Fitzgerald. Its 6.5-litre V12 produced 641 bhp. Just 20 coupes and 15 roadsters were built, making it among the rarest modern Lamborghinis.
